name: Mautic
what: Marketing automation platform for campaigns, segments, email journeys, forms, and lead nurturing.
solves: Advanced lifecycle marketing automation beyond simple newsletters or transactional notifications.
users: Marketing teams running complex nurture campaigns and multi-step journeys.
fit: Useful only if Hylono wants serious marketing automation. Otherwise Listmonk + Novu + n8n likely cover current needs with less overhead.
runtime: PHP application with DB, queues/cron, mail, and campaign/segment logic.
components: Campaign builder, contacts/segments, forms/emails, DB, cron/jobs, and integrations.
deploy: Self-host is possible but operationally heavier than Listmonk.
deps: Database, mail, cron/queue, storage, and marketing-process ownership.
apis: Marketing APIs, forms, webhooks, and campaign automations.
security: Marketing contacts, tracking, and consent handling require strong process governance.
setup_path: Only adopt if advanced nurture journeys become a real growth need.
env: DB settings, mail, app secrets, cron, storage, and tracking config.
operations: Deliverability, campaign QA, consent management, and cron reliability matter.
failure_points: Overkill compared to simpler newsletter/transactional stack.
integration: Can integrate with site forms, CRM, n8n, and analytics if lifecycle marketing becomes strategic.
verify: Decide whether advanced marketing automation is really needed beyond Listmonk/Novu/n8n.
gdpr: Marketing consent and contact data handling are central.
recommendation: LATER / ONLY IF ADVANCED MARKETING AUTOMATION IS NEEDED
overlap: Heavily overlaps with Listmonk, Dittofeed, and some n8n/Novu workflows.
codex_read_first: Read the overlap map with Listmonk/Novu before planning Mautic.
codex_best_path: Use only when a real nurture-marketing program requires it.
codex_never_assume: Never adopt a marketing automation suite before the team/process is ready to operate it.
